mapper.sql: t.id, t.subsidy_application_id, t.order_id, t.subsidy_type, t.subsidy_amount, t.subsidy_status, t.apply_time, t.approve_time, t.grant_time, t.reject_reason, t.external_apply_no, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_subsidy_application t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_subsidy_application t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_subsidy_application t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_subsidy_application ( subsidy_application_id, order_id, subsidy_type, subsidy_amount, subsidy_status, apply_time, approve_time, grant_time, reject_reason, external_apply_no, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{subsidyApplicationId}, #{orderId}, #{subsidyType}, #{subsidyAmount}, #{subsidyStatus}, #{applyTime}, #{approveTime}, #{grantTime}, #{rejectReason}, #{externalApplyNo}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_subsidy_application ( subsidy_application_id, order_id, subsidy_type, subsidy_amount, subsidy_status, apply_time, approve_time, grant_time, reject_reason, external_apply_no, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.subsidyApplicationId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.subsidyType}, #{item.subsidyAmount}, #{item.subsidyStatus}, #{item.applyTime}, #{item.approveTime}, #{item.grantTime}, #{item.rejectReason}, #{item.externalApplyNo}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_subsidy_application t SET
t.subsidy_status = #{subsidyStatus},
t.approve_time = #{approveTime},
t.grant_time = #{grantTime},
t.reject_reason = #{rejectReason},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_subsidy_application t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
